headline: Wall Street Lunch: Quantinuum Soars 12% On Nasdaq Debut Following $1.7B IPO
summary:
Quantinuum (QNT) debuted on the Nasdaq at $68 a share, up 12% from its IPO price.
The quantum computing company, which is majority owned by Honeywell (HON), sold 28M shares at $60 each.
